chapters.title: Customer Lifetime Value
chapters.transcript: CLV formula: average purchase value × purchase frequency × customer lifespan. Retention and churn.

chapters.title: Market Basket Analysis
chapters.transcript: Association rules, support, confidence, lift. Apriori algorithm. Amazon 'frequently bought together'.

chapters.title: Customer Segmentation
chapters.transcript: RFM analysis (recency, frequency, monetary). K-means clustering for segments. Personas.

chapters.title: A/B Testing
chapters.transcript: Hypothesis testing for conversion rates. Sample size calculation. Statistical significance.

chapters.title: Marketing Mix Modeling
chapters.transcript: Regression to measure channel effectiveness. ROAS, attribution. Budget allocation.
